在 AI 視覺與聽覺應用中，大量時間與運算資源消耗於資料前處理階段，例如影像轉換: In AI vision and hearing applications, a large amount of time and computing resources are consumed in the data pre-processing stage, such as image conversion, noise reduction, feature extraction and signal conversion. If you rely only on the CPU or GPU for processing, it is easy to create latency and power consumption bottlenecks, affecting immediate response capabilities. Through hardware parallelization and pipeline design, FPGA can complete real-time pre-processing before data enters the AI ​​model, significantly reducing latency and improving overall system performance.
PQC 演算法（如 CRYSTALS-Kyber、CRYSTALS-Dilith: PQC algorithms (such as CRYSTALS-Kyber, CRYSTALS-Dilithium, etc.) are highly computationally intensive and require memory access. If executed on a traditional CPU or GPU, they often face problems such as high latency, high power consumption, and insufficient efficiency. Since the hardware architecture of CPU and GPU is fixed and highly versatile, it is difficult to optimize for specific cryptographic operations.
在無線通訊與雷達系統中，產品競爭的關鍵不僅在於頻寬與運算能力，更在於即時性、可靠: In wireless communications and radar systems, the key to product competition is not only bandwidth and computing power, but also immediacy, reliability and system flexibility. Alpenglow Tek uses FPGA reconfigurable computing architecture and high-speed digital signal processing technology to provide low-latency, high-throughput and high-reliability RF solutions to help customers accelerate product development and realize innovative applications in new-generation communication and sensing systems.
